title: elaphrium microphyllum
intro: Elaphrium microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved Elaphrium, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Elaphrium microphyllum include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat digestive issues and other health problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
